case_title: MARIANNA MOHAMMED VS. ANNA CAROLINA TORMIM ALMEIDA

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOHAMMED, MARIANNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TORMIM ALMEIDA, ANNA CAROLINA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3225 JENNINGS STREET (BACK ROOM ON RIGHT SIDE), CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT TORMIM ALMEIDA, ANNA CAROLINA
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOHAMMED, MARIANNA AS TO DEFENDANT TORMIM ALMEIDA, ANNA CAROLINA SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOHAMMED, MARIANNA AS TO DEFENDANT TORMIM ALMEIDA, ANNA CAROLINA
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE , AND DECLARATION RE: LOST OR MISPLACD WRITTEN LEASE. $26.66 PER DAY (DAILY RENTAL VALUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOHAMMED, MARIANNA
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TORMIM ALMEIDA, ANNA CAROLINA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOHAMMED, MARIANNA SERVED SEP-23-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TORMIM ALMEIDA, ANNA CAROLINA
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT TORMIM ALMEIDA, ANNA CAROLINA
